item.title: AI in Healthcare
item.description:
• Summary: Three articles highlight the expanding role of AI in healthcare. A new AI healthcare residency program is being launched with the backing of a prominent Silicon Valley figure. A survey indicates that over 60% of Americans are using AI tools for medical information. Additionally, startup Gravity Rail has raised $2.75 million from Redesign Health to advance AI-powered patient communication.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, Fierce Pharma, Endpoints News

item.title: Discarded Articles
item.description:
• Summary: This article covers a podcast discussion on multiple topics including Kelonia, Eli Lilly, telehealth, pharma, Medicare, and obesity, along with other industry news.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News
